Let's Work Together

Service 01 — Social Media

Social Media Marketing Services in Guwahati.

Attention is basically the new currency, and right now most of it lives on social media. We help brands in Guwahati and across India build a real following - not just a vanity number, but an audience that engages, comments, shares, and eventually buys.

Discuss This Service All Services

What this service covers

A real following, not just vanity numbers.

At Colours and Patterns, we do not run the same playbook on every platform. Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, Threads, and YouTube all behave differently, so each platform gets its own content logic, format, timing, and tone.

Before any content goes out, we figure out who you are first: what the brand is actually about, who the customer is, and what story people should remember after they see you online.

Then comes the content calendar - reels, carousels, captions worth reading, and posts that start actual conversation instead of just collecting emoji replies. Hashtags are researched properly, and posts go out when your audience is online.

The community side gets handled too: comments answered, DMs replied to, and conversations kept warm. That is how casual followers slowly turn into people who recommend you to a friend.

We have worked with small businesses in Guwahati, brands across the North-East, companies in bigger metros, and clients outside India too. The job stays the same: stop the scroll and give you numbers that mean something.

What we do

  • Platform-specific strategy for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, Threads, and YouTube
  • Monthly content calendars with reels, carousels, stories, and captions
  • Hashtag research, posting-time planning, scheduling, and page management
  • Community management across comments, DMs, and warm conversations
  • Reporting focused on reach, growth, engagement, and useful next steps

Deliverables

  • Content calendar
  • Reels
  • Carousels
  • Captions
  • Community
  • Reports

How we run it

A platform-wise content rhythm built around the audience.
